title: mapania ballehensis
intro: Mapania ballehensis is a species of sedge, a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Mapania ballehensis include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate pain. In traditional medicine, Mapania ballehensis is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, with the leaves and rhizomes being used to make herbal teas and infusions for its medicinal properties.
